scope: Two accessible historical artifacts: one XRP/HBAR execution-output archive and one historical ChatGPT transcript text file.

sources.notes: Archive listing and text/JSON/CSV contents were inspected without executing bundled candidate code.
Contains historical user requests and assistant-generated claims. Claims are not accepted as current facts without independent evidence.

processing_controls: Preserve exact source hashes and filenames.
Separate assistant claims from user requirements and execution artifacts.
Do not infer direct XRP or HBAR token demand from network or ecosystem adoption.
Do not classify offline demo data as live market evidence.
Do not enable trading, money movement or personalised financial advice.
inaccessible_or_unprocessed: Historical DOCX files not present in this bounded two-source batch.
External webpages and APIs referenced in the transcript were not revalidated in this historical reconciliation step.
Assistant responses outside the supplied transcript and archive remain outside this batch denominator.
completion_scope: Batch 002 bounded artifact and claim reconciliation only; full XRP/HBAR historical reconstruction remains open.
rollback: Revert this batch through Git and preserve both source hashes and the superseded reconciliation record.
